title: March 5th, 2021 (2)
body:
- daily notes
    - akabilly
    - professional
        - imagine you have a toolbox that you keep useful mental tools in. dreams elevate your nightly defrag into an unmatched vr theater of foundational importance to both psychology and divination
        - see the work then you go do it lyrics
            - see the work then you go do it
            - want out a maze meant you gotta go through it
            - say
            - when it's time to get back: intuit
            - follow a thread til you lucid
            - out of your head
            - out of your body
            - out of your bed
            - out of your garden
        - whatever it is your doing lyrics
            - whatever it is you're doing
            - you can't do it just to leave a mark on the world
            - you will die and be forgotten
            - memory is just a coffin
            - moreso history
            - you gotta find another reason to do it
            - something you believe in more than just living through it
    - professional
